title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF MALIRONG, MUNICIPALITY OF PALO, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO LIBERTAD.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5745 / 53 OG No. 16, 5153 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1740, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF MALIRONG, MUNICIPALITY OF PALO, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO LIBERTAD.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Malirong, Municipality of Palo, Province of Leyte, is changed to Libertad.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
